definitions: (literary) mythical bird similar to a phoenix
(archaic) waterbird similar to a large duck
(bird species of China) Chinese nuthatch (Sitta villosa)
(bird species of China) snowy-cheeked laughingthrush (Ianthocincla sukatschewi)
dragon's vein, terrain that looks like a dragon
